title: United Kingdom First Adult Passport Application
description: Apply for a first British passport as an adult (aged 16 or over, or turning 16 within 3 weeks) who has never held a UK passport, or whose last one was issued before 1 January 1994, through HM Passport Office's online service. Unlike a renewal, a first-time application requires documentary evidence of British nationality plus a person to confirm the applicant's identity. This document describes the nationality-evidence branch (by birth country, birth year, and route), applicant details, the online identity-confirmation step, and the photo/payment choice. It does not submit the application; the live gov.uk source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the GOV.UK 'Getting your first adult passport' guide and its 'Apply online' and 'What documents you need to apply' sub-pages, plus the 'Countersigning passport applications and photos' guidance for the identity-confirmation step. Like gb/dvla/vehicle-tax, the online service itself (an authenticated HMPO portal) has no published field-by-field specification, so this document is transcribed from the surrounding GOV.UK guidance prose rather than an independently captured screen-by-screen review. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: nationalityEvidenceRoute
fields.label: How do you hold British nationality?
fields.description: uk_born_before_1983 = born in the UK before 1 January 1983 (birth/adoption certificate alone is sufficient); uk_born_on_or_after_1983 = born in the UK on or after 1 January 1983 (birth certificate plus a parent's nationality or immigration-status evidence is required); outside_uk_naturalised_or_registered = born outside the UK and already hold a certificate of naturalisation or registration; outside_uk_bot_citizen_born_before_1983 = born outside the UK, a British overseas territories citizen, before 1 January 1983; outside_uk_father_born_uk_before_1983 = born outside the UK before 1 January 1983 with a father born in the UK; outside_uk_born_on_or_after_1983 = born outside the UK on or after 1 January 1983 with a parent's British nationality evidence. Determines which further evidence fields are required.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK / born outside the UK

fields.name: birthOrAdoptionCertificate
fields.label: Full original birth or adoption certificate
fields.description: Required for every nationalityEvidenceRoute except outside_uk_naturalised_or_registered (that route needs no birth certificate). For uk_born_on_or_after_1983 and the two outside_uk born-on/before-1983 routes that name a parent, the certificate must show the parents' details. Original documents only; photocopies are not accepted.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK before 1 January 1983 / on or after 1 January 1983

fields.name: currentPassport
fields.label: Your current passport
fields.description: Required only when nationalityEvidenceRoute is outside_uk_bot_citizen_born_before_1983, in addition to birthOrAdoptionCertificate and passportUsedToEnterUK.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — citizen of a British overseas territory and born before 1 January 1983

fields.name: fathersBirthCertificate
fields.label: Your father's birth certificate
fields.description: Required only when nationalityEvidenceRoute is outside_uk_father_born_uk_before_1983, alongside birthOrAdoptionCertificate, parentsMarriageCertificate, and passportUsedToEnterUK.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born before 1 January 1983 and your father was born in the UK

fields.name: parentEvidenceType
fields.label: Which evidence are you sending about a parent?
fields.description: Required only when nationalityEvidenceRoute is uk_born_on_or_after_1983. The source states you need your birth/adoption certificate 'and either' nationality_evidence (a parent's own UK nationality documents) or immigration_status_evidence (evidence of a parent's UK immigration status at the time of your birth).
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK on or after 1 January 1983

fields.name: parentNationalityEvidenceParent
fields.label: Whose British nationality evidence are you sending?
fields.description: Required when parentEvidenceType is nationality_evidence (route uk_born_on_or_after_1983). If you send documents relating to your father, you must also provide parentsMarriageCertificate.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK on or after 1 January 1983

fields.name: parentNationalityEvidenceType
fields.label: Parent's evidence of British nationality
fields.description: Required when parentEvidenceType is nationality_evidence (route uk_born_on_or_after_1983), and also when nationalityEvidenceRoute is outside_uk_born_on_or_after_1983 (that route's own, textually narrower 'evidence of one parent's British nationality' requirement). uk_birth_or_adoption_certificate = the named parent's own full UK birth or adoption certificate; naturalisation_or_registration_certificate = the named parent's certificate of naturalisation or registration; british_passport_valid_at_applicants_birth = the named parent's British passport that was valid when the applicant was born; british_passport_number_only = only the parent's British passport number, where the passport itself is no longer available.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK on or after 1 January 1983 / born outside the UK on or after 1 January 1983

fields.name: parentImmigrationStatusEvidence
fields.label: Evidence of a parent's UK immigration status at the time of your birth
fields.description: Required when parentEvidenceType is immigration_status_evidence (route uk_born_on_or_after_1983): for example, a foreign passport belonging to one of your parents that was valid when you were born.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK on or after 1 January 1983

fields.name: parentsMarriageCertificate
fields.label: Parents' marriage certificate
fields.description: Required when parentNationalityEvidenceParent is father (route uk_born_on_or_after_1983), and always required when nationalityEvidenceRoute is outside_uk_father_born_uk_before_1983.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born in the UK on or after 1 January 1983 / born before 1 January 1983 and your father was born in the UK

fields.name: naturalisationOrRegistrationCertificate
fields.label: Certificate of naturalisation or registration
fields.description: Required when nationalityEvidenceRoute is outside_uk_naturalised_or_registered. The certificate must already have been issued before applying; a first-time application cannot be made while naturalisation or registration is still pending.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — you have a certificate of naturalisation or registration

fields.name: passportUsedToEnterUK
fields.label: Passport used to enter the UK, or foreign passport you're included on
fields.description: Required for every outside_uk_* nationalityEvidenceRoute (outside_uk_naturalised_or_registered, outside_uk_bot_citizen_born_before_1983, outside_uk_father_born_uk_before_1983, outside_uk_born_on_or_after_1983): the passport (own or, if included as a child on a parent's passport, that parent's foreign passport) used to travel to the UK.
fields.sourceRef: What documents you need to apply — born outside the UK

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — your details

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First and middle names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — your details

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — your details

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used for application status updates and to send the identity confirmer their instructions.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — contact details

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Address — street address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — your details

fields.name: addressTown
fields.label: Address — town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — your details

fields.name: postcode
fields.label: Postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. UK postcode, e.g. SW1A 1AA.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — your details

fields.name: photoFile
fields.label: Digital photo
fields.description: A digital photo meeting the published passport photo rules, uploaded as part of the online application.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — what you need

fields.name: identityConfirmerFullName
fields.label: Identity confirmer — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The person who will confirm the applicant's identity online after the application is submitted and paid for. Must have known the applicant personally for at least 2 years and be able to identify them from their photo; cannot be a relative by birth or marriage, a partner, or someone who lives at the same address as the applicant.
fields.sourceRef: Countersigning passport applications and photos — who can confirm identity

fields.name: identityConfirmerPassportType
fields.label: Identity confirmer's passport
fields.description: british = a current British passport; irish = a current Irish passport. One of these is required when the identity confirmer lives in the UK, which is assumed for a first UK adult passport application. A broader set of nationalities is accepted only when the confirmer is resident overseas (out of scope for this document; see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Countersigning passport applications and photos — passport requirement

fields.name: identityConfirmerPassportNumber
fields.label: Identity confirmer's passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Entered by the identity confirmer during their own online confirmation step, not by the applicant.
fields.sourceRef: Countersigning passport applications and photos — confirming identity online

fields.name: productRequested
fields.label: What are you applying for?
fields.description: standard_passport = the standard 34-page passport; large_passport = the 50-page 'frequent traveller' passport, available at an additional fee under the Passport (Fees) Regulations 2022.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — passport options

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.label: Payment method
fields.description: debit_or_credit_card is the only payment method the online service accepts. Current fees are published on the live source and are deliberately not encoded here.
fields.sourceRef: Apply online — payment
